emails.body:
Hi there,

Your recent Amazon order #D-4729103 has been delivered! We hope you're enjoying your new items.

As a valued customer, we'd like to offer you 20% off your next purchase when you spend $50 or more. Use code THANKYOU20 at checkout.

This offer expires October 15, 2026.

Happy shopping,
The Amazon Team

---
You're receiving this because you opted in to promotional emails. Unsubscribe here: amazon.example/unsubscribe

Re: Special offer #1

Don't miss out! Your 20% off code THANKYOU20 expires soon.

We noticed you haven't used your discount yet. There's still time to save on thousands of items — electronics, home goods, books, and more.

Shop now: amazon.example/offers

Offer ends October 15, 2026 at 11:59 PM PT.

Thanks for being a loyal customer,
Amazon Promotions

---
Manage preferences: amazon.example/email-preferences
